title: Vaseline Lip Therapy Rosy Lips .16oz Pink Tinted Lip Balm Pure Petroleum Jelly
description:
Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter Lip Balm Moisturizing Lip Stick is clinically proven to help heal dry lips! Formulated with Vaseline’s 100% pure triple-purified petroleum jelly and rich cocoa butter, this lip balm moisturizing stick works to lock in moisture and provide proven relief for dull, dry, cracked, sunburnt, windburned or damaged lips. FORMULA: Alongside petroleum jelly, cocoa butter is a key ingredient in this lip conditioning formula. Rich in antioxidants, vitamins and fatty acids, coco butter deeply penetrates the layers of skin to moisturize, improve elasticity and protect lips by creating a barrier to lock in moisture

Vaseline Lip Therapy Rosy Lips .16oz Pink Tinted Lip Balm Pure Petroleum Jelly

Vaseline Lip Therapy Rosy Lip Balm is clinically proven to help heal dry lips and leave them looking beautiful, conditioned, and naturally rosy after just one application and is suitable for everyday use.

Key Features

  • SOFT MOISTURIZED LIPS: For healthy, deeply moisturized, and conditioned lips, Vaseline Lip Therapy Rosy Lip Balm Moisturizer with Pure Petroleum Jelly instantly softens and soothes dry lips; suitable for daily use and is a great addition to any survival kit or first aid bag; light rose fragrance and leaves lips with a naturally pink tint
  • UNIQUE FORMULA: Formulated with 100 percent pure triple-purified petroleum jelly, this Vaseline lip therapy lip balm works to lock in moisture and provide proven relief for dull, dry, cracked, sunburnt, windburned or damaged lips
  • NATURAL PINK LIP TINT: Skip the heavy lipstick or lip gloss application that instantaneously dries out lips; instead, go for a naturally pink tinted lip that leaves lips glossy but hydrated and conditioned
  • TRAVEL SIZE: This pocket-sized .16oz Vaseline lip therapy lip balm is a great addition to your makeup bag and travel accessories; small enough to tote with you wherever you go, take it on your next vacation, road trip, road trip or ski or snowboarding adventure and never be without beautiful, soft and rosy lips
  • NON-GREASY FORMULA: The Vaseline Lip Therapy Rosy Lip Balm Moisturizer goes on soft and lightweight while providing the utmost moisturization for your lips; non-stick and no greasy residue is left behind before, during, or after application

Product Specifications

  • MPN: VASLTROSE16
  • UPC: 859581599638
  • Color: Pink
  • Size: Regular

Formulated with 100% pure triple-purified petroleum jelly, this Vaseline lip therapy lip balm works to lock in moisture and provide proven relief for dull, dry, cracked, sunburnt, windburned or damaged lips. The lip balm goes on soft and lightweight while providing the utmost moisturization for your lips; no greasy residue is left behind.

Featuring all the great qualities Vaseline products are known for - instant hydration, non-stick and non-greasy formula, and long-lasting quality – this mini lip balm with plastic close top is all those great features but with a little extra attention on the beauty and makeup front. Leaving a naturally pink tint on lips with a subtle rose fragrance, skip the heavy lipstick or lip gloss application that instantaneously dries out lips Instead, go for a naturally pink tinted lip that leaves lips glossy but hydrated and conditioned simultaneously.

This pocket-sized .16oz Vaseline lip balm is also a great addition to your makeup bag and travel accessories; small enough to tote with you wherever you go, take it on your next vacation, road trip, road trip or ski or snowboarding adventure. Vaseline Lip Therapy Rosy Lip Balm Moisturizer with Pure Petroleum Jelly softens and soothes dry lips for healthy, deeply moisturized, and conditioned lips - also a great addition to any survival kit or first aid bag.
